calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Scott Hughes, #12365.

Phil Thomas, Esq. appeared for plaintiff International Longshore & Warehouse Union Local 10.
Richard Mead, President of International Longshore & Warehouse Union Local 10, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Alan Johnson or J-Way Leasing & Marine.
Default was entered against defendant Alan Johnson on June 22, 2010.
Default was entered against defendant J-Way Leasing & Marine on September 24, 2010

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff International Longshore & Warehouse Union Local 10, and against the Defaulted Defendants Alan Johnson and J-Way Leasing and Marine as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,621.92.
Attorney Fees - $5,000.00.
Costs - $490.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $38,111.92.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
